data.body: Research complete. Confirmed full integration surface: claim path (txn.claim_core / claim_compute), close-gate analog (_completion_precheck), signing (sign_manifest/verify_signature/verify_record/head_sha), config (VerifyConfig + _SECTIONS), event registries (event_append.EVENT_TYPES write allow-list; reducer KNOWN_EVENT_TYPES replay set; _NON_REPLAY_KNOWN_TYPES fsck-recognized; compaction preserves non-KNOWN), schemas dir (src/rebar/schemas + findings.validate_structured), criteria_v8.json (32 descriptors). Design confirmed with user: (1) review_plan capability + (2) optional claim gate (default off, fast sig-verify, --force). Building now: package src/rebar/llm/plan_review/{registry,det_floor,passes,orchestrator,attest,sidecar} + schema + config + claim integration + CLI + MCP + tests + docs.
